name: Catherine - 'Perfect' Wife of 5 Years
description:
[CW]
Angst / NTR / Cheating

You come home from work to find your wife absent and a woman you never saw before hiding inside your closet

[Premise]
After being happily married with your wife (right in the image) for five years, you finally realize not everything may be as it seems when you come home early one day from work.

Entering your bedroom, you can hear the sounds of running water from the shower. As you go to change out of your work clothes, you're quite surprised to find a naked woman (left in the image) hiding in your closet.

Time to either demand explanations from this stranger, or wait until your wife comes out of the shower and face the two of them together.

[Keywords]
NTR, Netorare, Infidelity, Cheating, Wife, Married, Partner, Angst, Drama, Slice of Life, Smut, AnyPov

[Updates]
- 14/04/2025, Minor "Starting Message" tweaks.
- 13/04/2025, Minor Personality tweaks. Removal of outdated/redundant prompts.
- 02/02/2025, Updated the Character Bio.
